label: Value of Statistical Life for EU project appraisal

eu_average.label: EU-27 average VSL
eu_average.note: Derived from OECD meta-analysis, income-adjusted to EU average GDP per capita

member_state_adjustment.description: No single EU-wide VSL exists. The EC CBA Guide recommends benefit transfer using income elasticity. Adjust the reference VSL by relative GDP per capita (PPP).

source.publication: Guide to Cost-Benefit Analysis of Investment Projects for Cohesion Policy 2014-2020; OECD Mortality Risk Valuation (2025)

methodology: Benefit transfer from OECD meta-analysis base VSL. Income elasticity of 1.0 for cross-country transfer within the EU. GDP per capita at PPP from Eurostat.
caveats: EU average is illustrative. Always adjust for the specific member state.
Some member states publish their own VSL (e.g. France, Sweden). Use national values where available.
The EC CBA Guide does not mandate a single VSL value.
